title: Unobtrusive Fire Creep
description: Makes Fire Creep much less annoying, specially when used with Nuclear Emesis
body:
**Makes a series of changes to the Wynncraft's fire-related textures to make them much less annoying and obstructive. This can be useful if playing with Fire Creep, especially when paired with Nuclear Emesis.** 

## Texture Changes
- Fire is now much less vibrant
- Fire is now much lower (hud fire included)
- Fire does not emit any particles anymore
- Arrows do not release flame particles anymore
- Fire is now 95% quieter

## Preview
![Lower and less saturated fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eaad3aa4bfe3c4733d30d83db6e7e5d1eb98d33e.png)

## Dependency
_Note: this pack only works if it is placed above the server resource pack. To do that you can use [Server Pack Unblocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker)._
